Derivative Free Optimization Method (Based Feature Visulization) Notes 1

September 9, 2018

Task discription To find/generate the stimuli that evoked the strongest response of a neuron in a visual system is in essense an optimization problem. But the optimization task on hand has several unique features that are essential to the choice of optimization algorithms, for example,
